scripts.seagen:market: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; rm -rf _generated_/market && sea generate entity -u "$MARKET_DATABASE_URL" -o _generated_/market --with-serde serialize
scripts.seagen:portfolio: set -a; . ./.env; set +a; rm -rf _generated_/portfolio && sea generate entity -u "$PORTFOLIO_DATABASE_URL" -o _generated_/portfolio --with-serde serialize
